title: The 8×10 Blind Spot — The #1 Searched Frame Size Most Sellers Skip
caption:
8×10 is the #1 searched frame size on Etsy.

Most sellers only list 2:3 ratios — 4×6, 6×9, 8×12.

That means every buyer searching for 8×10 leaves empty-handed.

8×10 = 4:5 ratio (2400×3000px · 300 DPI).

SnapToSize generates all 4:5 sizes automatically — 8×10, 16×20, 24×30 — in every upload. Plus ISO A-series for EU and UK buyers.

Upload once. Cover every buyer.

Link in bio -> app.snaptosize.com
